# SURYA Department - URGAA Operations Policies

## Service Level Agreement (SLA)

### Uptime Guarantee
- 99.5% network uptime guaranteed
- 99% individual charger uptime target
- Maximum unplanned downtime: 4 hours/month
- Planned maintenance: Off-peak hours only

### Response Times
- **Critical (P0)**: Charger offline - 15 minutes
- **High (P1)**: Performance degradation - 1 hour
- **Medium (P2)**: Minor issues - 4 hours
- **Low (P3)**: Enhancements - 48 hours

## Energy Management Policy

### Load Balancing
- Automatic load distribution across chargers
- Peak demand capping at 80% capacity
- Priority charging for critical vehicles (ambulances, etc.)
- Queue management for high-demand periods

### Pricing Strategy
- Dynamic pricing based on grid load
- Peak hour surcharge: +30%
- Off-peak discount: -20%
- Renewable energy discount: -10%
- Subscription plans for frequent users

## Maintenance Policy

### Predictive Maintenance
- AI-based health scoring for all chargers
- Maintenance scheduled based on health score
- Parts replacement before failure
- Minimize reactive maintenance

### Preventive Maintenance
- Monthly inspection of all chargers
- Quarterly deep cleaning
- Annual calibration
- Firmware updates every 2 months

## Data Privacy & Security

### User Data Protection
- Charging session data encrypted
- PII data isolated and protected
- GDPR compliance for EU users
- Data retention: 90 days for transactions

### Charger Security
- Secure OCPP communication
- Certificate-based authentication
- Regular security audits
- Firmware signed and verified
